name: fluent
description: Fluent helps AI assistants remember what fits your life across meals, style, and health.

interface.shortDescription: Life context for meals, style, and health.
interface.longDescription: Fluent connects Codex to saved Meals, Style, and Health context.
defaultPrompt: Plan next week around my schedule and turn it into a grocery list I can actually shop from.
Plan my workouts for this week and keep them realistic.
Tell me if this clothing purchase is actually right for my wardrobe or just attractive in isolation.
